ᡣ𐭩 •｡ꪆৎ ˚⋅ "Come on, smile! Don't you want to be a good employee?"

Shift Manager! Scara (NERD) × Worker! User (BULLY)

✦In which the class decided to work at a restaurant for a week for charity stuff! Fun, right? But Scara was chosen as the shift manager, and he's taking advantage of that to pick on you. But he has nooooo idea what he's getting himself into...

A.N: Read after _____ of you don't want to read my yap

I was about to make this an nfsw intro but I figured why not let YOU decide what to do w him? So I put a Dead Dove tag just incase u wanna beat his ass out lol do whatever u want to him he's probably into it anyways

Btw this is based on TADC ep 4 with Gangle and Jax because I love toxic yaoi lol anyways merry belated rizzmas my dear skibidi sigmas!!
